Incognidium + Murkiu Demo

This page demonstrates the rendering and scripting capabilities of the Incognidium browser engine with the Murkiu JavaScript engine.

1. Typography and Text Styling

Normal paragraph text at 16px default size.

This is larger text at 24px.

This is smaller text at 12px.

Bold text with strong tag.

Italic text with em tag.

Underlined text with u tag.

Red colored text.

Blue colored text.

Green colored text.

Purple colored text.

Orange colored text.

Mixed text: normal, bold, italic, and underlined in one line.

2. Hyperlinks

Visit example.com - Click to navigate!

Load httpbin HTML test page

3. Flexbox Layout - Cards

HTML5 Parser

Full spec-compliant HTML5 parsing via html5ever. Handles malformed HTML gracefully.

CSS Engine

Selector matching with specificity. Cascade, inheritance, and computed values.

Layout Engine

Block, inline, and flexbox layout. Word wrapping and line breaking.

JS Engine

Murkiu: lexer, parser, bytecode compiler, stack-based VM with GC.

4. Box Model Demo

This outer box has 20px padding, 3px border, and 10px vertical margins.

This inner box has 10px padding and 1px blue border.

5. Nested Flex - Sidebar Layout

Sidebar

Navigation

Dashboard

Settings

Profile

Main Content Area

This demonstrates a typical sidebar + main content layout using nested flexbox. The sidebar has a fixed 200px width, and the main content area grows to fill the remaining space.

Nested card 1

Nested card 2

6. Table-like Grid Layout

Feature
Status
Engine
HTML5 Parsing
Complete
Incognidium
CSS Cascade
Complete
Incognidium
Flexbox
Complete
Incognidium
JavaScript VM
Complete
Murkiu
DOM Bindings
Complete
Murkiu
Image Loading
Complete
Incognidium

7. Deep Nesting Demo

Level 1 - Red border, light red background

Level 2 - Green border, light green background

Level 3 - Blue border, light blue background

Deeply nested elements maintain proper styling through CSS inheritance and cascade.

8. JavaScript Engine (Murkiu)

Counter Demo

The counter below is powered by Murkiu JavaScript engine:

Increment
Decrement
Reset

9. Status Bar Component

Connected
CPU: 23%
Memory: 67%
Disk: 89%
Uptime: 72h

10. Lists

Unordered List

  • HTML5 parsing
  • CSS cascade
  • Flexbox layout
  • Image loading
  • Link navigation

Ordered List

  1. Parse HTML
  2. Parse CSS
  3. Resolve styles
  4. Compute layout
  5. Paint to screen

11. Canvas 2D API

Incognidium Browser Engine v0.1 - A custom HTML/CSS/JS rendering engine written in Rust.

Rendering: Incognidium (html5ever + cssparser + tiny-skia + winit)

JavaScript: Murkiu (custom lexer, parser, bytecode compiler, and VM)
